title: crataegus crus-galli var. fontanesiana
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. fontanesiana, also known as the French hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn tree that is native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and red berries. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to stimulate cardiovascular health and improve blood circulation, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli var. fontanesiana include reducing blood pressure, improving heart function, and providing antioxidant effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to promote heart health and well-being.
